THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REYNOLDS, SEAN CAMERON, VICTORIA AKA VICTORIA REYNOLDS $5,949.11 PRINCIPAL, $775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $297.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,021.61, -AS TO THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $5,949.11 ($4,508.70 OF WHICH IS AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY AGAINST DEFT. VICTORIA CAMERON AKA VICTORIA REYNOLDS AND SEAN REYNOLDS, $1,440.41 OF WHICH IS AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF SOLEY AGAINST DEFT. SEAN REYNOLDS); ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $775.00 AND COURT COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $297.50 FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $7,021.61.
